title: Imitation Game for Adversarial Disillusion with

These adversarial attacks manifest in two primary forms: deductive illusion, where specific stimuli are crafted based on the victim model’s general decision logic, and inductive illusion, where the victim model’s general decision logic is shaped by specific stimuli. title: Role play with large language models
one_paragraph_summary: Nature | Vol 623 | 16 November 2023 | 493 Perspective Role play with large language models Murray Shanahan1,2 ✉, Kyle McDonell3 ✉ & Laria Reynolds3 ✉ As dialogue agents become increasingly human-like in their performance, we must develop effective ways to describe their behaviour in high-level terms without falling into the trap of anthropomorphism. Here we foreground the concept of role play. Casting dialogue-agent behaviour in terms of role play allows us to draw on familiar folk psychological terms, without ascribing human characteristics to language models that they in fact lack. Two impor...
